subject: New Opening: Microservices Engineer
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Digitalsverige
ROLE: Senior Microservices Engineer
START: 2021-05-01
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / hybrid
RATE: 900 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java, GCP, Kubernetes and Redis.

Key requirements:
• Java
• GCP
• Kubernetes
• Redis

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Alicia Strand
Talent Scout
ByteForce
Tel: +46 70 788 90 12
